title: Responsive grid component for displaying diagrams, documents, and designs
purpose: Displays a responsive grid of items with search filtering, loading states, and error handling. Integrates with session management for item selection and display.
module_context: Exports a React functional component ItemGrid that accepts various props for configuration including items to display, search functionality, loading states, and selection handling. Uses React hooks for state management and memoization.

steps.content: Initialize local state for search query.
Filter items based on the current search query using memoization.
Define a callback handler for item clicks that delegates to the provided onItemClick prop.
Define a callback handler for search input changes that updates the local search query state.
Render loading state with spinner and message if data is loading.
Render error state with icon and message if an error is present.
Render empty state with icon and message if no items exist.
Render the main grid layout including search bar, items grid, and footer with item count.
Return all items if search query is empty.
Filter items by matching search query against item name or type.
Invoke the onItemClick prop callback with the clicked item.
Update the local search query state with the input value.
